app.tagline: Clinical clarity for your daily health

charts.caption_trend: Higher points mean stronger symptoms on that log. Use this to spot worsening or recovery.
charts.caption_bars: Simple count of how often each symptom was recorded — easy to see what dominates.

dashboard.alert_body: One or more symptoms have persisted beyond normal thresholds. Medical screening is recommended.
dashboard.reminder_body: You have not logged any symptoms today. Keep your data current for accurate insights.

search.title: Dashboard Search
search.no_matches_sub: Try searching for symptom names, alerts, analysis, timeline, report, or profile keywords.

risk.title: Risk Assessment
risk.no_analysis_sub: Run an AI scan to see your risk level and insights.
risk.action_pending: Run an AI analysis to get personalized recommendations.

charts.no_data_sub: Log your first symptom to see the chart
charts.no_match: No timeline points match this search
charts.no_match_sub: Try a symptom name, date, or broader keyword.
charts.no_freq_match: No symptom frequencies match this search
charts.no_insight_match: No insight cards match your search
charts.no_insight_sub: Try searching for profile, report, lifestyle, or analysis.

insights.title: Intelligence
insights.profile_body: Based on your {{lifestyle}} profile, regular symptomatic monitoring is recommended. Your tracking consistency supports accurate predictive modeling.
insights.profile_empty: Complete your health profile in Settings to receive personalised guidance.
insights.pattern_body: You have logged {{count}} symptoms with an average severity of {{avg}}/10. Consider running an AI analysis for deeper insights.

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from pilot users and testers

ravi.name: Ravi Kumar
ravi.text: CareTrace AI reminders made my medication routine completely stress-free. I never miss a dose now.

anitha.name: Anitha Reddy
anitha.text: Tracking my father's medicines is now simple. It reduced our anxiety significantly.

suresh.name: Suresh
suresh.text: The interface is clean and intuitive. Very practical for daily healthcare management.

priya.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
priya.text: Solutions like CareTrace AI can improve medication adherence and patient safety.

symptoms.title: Track Your Symptoms
symptoms.subtitle: Help us understand how you're feeling by logging your symptoms.
symptoms.empty_state: Please add at least one symptom to continue.

errors.incomplete: Please complete all fields to log your symptom.
errors.duration_min: Duration must be at least 1 day.

notifications.voice_success: Voice successfully transcribed: 'I had a strong fever for 3 days'

timeline.title: Your Health Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Review your symptom history to track patterns and progress.

empty.title: No symptoms recorded yet.
empty.body: Go back to the symptoms page to log your active profile.

history.title: Symptoms History
history.subtitle: A comprehensive chronological record of your logged symptoms.

empty.title: No History Found
empty.body: You haven't logged any symptoms yet.

analysis.title: AI Health Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Deep recursive logic engines isolating patterns against clinical probability models to formulate actionable steps.

loading.title: Analyzing your structural baseline...
loading.body: Processing historical symptoms, mapping multi-variate interactions, and generating severity deltas...

report.persisted_msg: Your symptoms have persisted longer than standard demographic limits.
report.clustering_msg: Multiple compounding symptoms detected clustering geographically across identical temporal zones.

analysis.disclaimer: This analysis is an AI simulation formulated via mock vectors. It explicitly does not replace professional clinical diagnosis. Always consult verified medical structures.

ready.title: System Ready for Processing
ready.body: Initiate the intelligence scanner to isolate anomalies dynamically traversing your entire symptom timeline array.

alerts.title: Health Alerts & Notifications
alerts.subtitle: Stay informed about your health status and any recommended actions.
alerts.consult_reminder: Please consult a healthcare professional for proper evaluation.

empty.title: No Alerts
empty.body: Your symptoms are within normal ranges. Continue monitoring your health.

alerts.footer_disclaimer: This is not medical advice. Always consult healthcare professionals for health concerns.

reports.title: Analytical Health Reports
reports.subtitle: Review your generated health summaries and extract analytical PDF reports.

charts.empty: No symptoms logged yet. Add entries to view a trend chart.

reports.disclaimer: This report is generated by AI and does not constitute a medical diagnosis.

settings.title: Application Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and application preferences.
settings.about_body: CareTrace AI is a personalized health tracking system designed to help you monitor symptoms and visualize patterns over time.

recommendations.title: Personalized Health Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Based on your symptoms and AI analysis, here are tailored recommendations for your health.
recommendations.disclaimer: This is not medical advice. Always consult healthcare professionals for health concerns.

empty.title: No analysis data available.
empty.body: Please complete the symptom assessment and AI analysis first.

low: Maintain a healthy lifestyle with balanced nutrition.
Stay hydrated and get adequate rest.
Keep a symptom journal for future reference.
medium: Schedule an appointment with your primary care physician.
Consider additional screening tests as recommended.
Monitor symptoms closely and note any changes.
Follow up with healthcare provider within 1-2 weeks.
high: Consult a doctor immediately for professional evaluation.
Seek medical attention if symptoms worsen.
Follow all medical advice and treatment plans.
Keep detailed records of all symptoms and treatments.

demo.banner: You are using a Demo Account — data is for demonstration only.

landing.hero_subtitle: AI-powered symptom tracking & predictive health analytics. Early detection. Better decisions. Take control of your wellness journey.
landing.feature_tracking_desc: Log and monitor symptoms with voice input, severity scoring, and intelligent categorization.
landing.feature_analysis_desc: Advanced pattern recognition algorithms analyze your symptom data to assess health risks.
landing.feature_timeline_desc: Interactive charts and timelines to visualize your health patterns over time.
landing.feature_multilingual_desc: Full support for English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, and Kannada languages.
landing.trusted_by: Trusted by healthcare professionals and patients
landing.privacy_badge: HIPAA Compliant · End-to-End Encrypted · Your Data Stays Private

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to your health intelligence dashboard
auth.signup_subtitle: Create your profile and start tracking symptoms in minutes.
auth.demo_subtitle: See charts, alerts, and AI insights with sample data—no setup required.
auth.try_demo_subtitle: Open a full dashboard with sample symptoms, risk analysis, and alerts—ideal for a quick tour.
auth.demo_failed: We could not reach the server. Check your connection, or try again in a moment.

errors.password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.failed: Authentication failed. Check inputs and try again.
errors.email_registered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
